title: Complete Shield Overhaul [Overlay]
description: Enhances the shield by adding more information about the shield and adding Low Shield
body:
This pack adds a lot of valuble information about the shield. All In Vanilla Minecraft

**1. Shield Durability**
The Shield will show a number on it, displaying, how much durability the shield still has left.
![Durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e320b5a869e8877e833fd134536d49b9356cbc.png)

**2. Shield Status**
Shows if your shield is disabled by changing its color to red and interpolating the middle![Shield Status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fe0077aca7fa130c6116d5038164bfec6e5a0cc.png)

**3. Side + Low Shield**
By Making the Shield smaller and if not held hold on the side. You say way more of the Screen what makes it easier to play.
![Low Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e917fa5bd45ae41705be81d21bd10ba6a774d84.gif)

4. Shield Texture
Changes the Shield to a more satisfying texture for pvp

Credits:
Thanks to HerobaneNair for letting me edit his shield durability pack. 
Thanks to Bluebird for using his shieldstatus pack as inspiration.
